mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment methods, API helpers for enrollment, or page objects for enrollment flow. Batch 6 contains only core infrastructure modules (PlaywrightManager, ReportsManager, scraper, settings) with no HP Instant Ink specific functionality, no enrollment methods, and no API helpers for printer management. Enrollment components likely exist in batches containing API helpers or page objects for HP Instant Ink enrollment flows.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires API helpers to retrieve and verify subscription details. Batch 6 contains no API helper modules, no subscription management utilities, and no methods for checking subscription state. These components likely exist in batches containing API client classes or subscription helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires API helpers to get subscription status and verify it is 'subscribed'. Batch 6 contains no subscription status checking methods, no API utilities, and no state verification helpers. These components likely exist in batches containing subscription API helpers or state management utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires page objects for the dashboard with pause plan button/link locators and click methods. Batch 6 contains no page objects, no UI locators, and no dashboard-related components. The scraper.py file is for baseline creation, not for test execution actions. Page objects for dashboard and pause plan functionality likely exist in batches containing page object modules.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: Test case C44873414 tests HP Instant Ink subscription management functionality, specifically the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on the Print and Payment History page during plan pause scenarios. This test requires: (1) Page objects for PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage and DashboardPage with UI element locators for billing cycle card, progress bars, tooltips, info icons, and page count displays, (2) Action methods for navigation, clicking pause plan, hovering/clicking info icons, and refreshing pages, (3) Verification methods for checking element visibility, text content, progress bar colors and fill states, tooltip messages, and page counts, (4) API helpers for printer enrollment, subscription management, time shifting, billing charge triggering, and page printing simulation, (5) Test data constants for URLs, page count limits, expected tooltip messages, and color values. Batch 6 contains ONLY core infrastructure modules: (1) PlaywrightManager - browser lifecycle management (setup, teardown, context manager), (2) ReportsManager - test execution reporting with AST-based step tracking and HTML/JSON report generation, (3) scraper.py - web page scraping utility for baseline creation (not for test execution), (4) settings.py - framework configuration, constants, and logging setup, (5) __init__.py - empty package marker. NONE of these files contain: page objects for HP Instant Ink pages, UI locators for billing cycle cards or progress bars, action methods for HP Instant Ink interactions, verification methods for HP Instant Ink UI elements, API helpers for subscription or printer management, or test data specific to HP Instant Ink functionality. The PlaywrightManager provides browser setup which is used by ALL tests but is not specific to this test case. The ReportsManager provides reporting which is used by ALL tests but does not help execute this specific test. The scraper is for baseline creation, not test execution. The settings module provides configuration but no HP Instant Ink specific data. All components needed for this test case (page objects, locators, action methods, verification methods, API helpers, test data) likely exist in different batches containing page object modules, API helper modules, or HP Instant Ink specific utility modules.
